name: Jazan Energy and Development Company
summary: Jazan Energy and Development Company, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the fisheries, agricultural, industrial, and real estate businesses in Saudi Arabia. The company is involved in the cultivation of mangoes and shrimps; preservation of fish and fish products; cooling and freezing of fruits; production and packaging and distributing of pure filtered water; operates hotels; and other activities. It engages in the buying, selling, and renting of land and real estate properties. Jazan Energy and Development Company was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Jazan, Saudi Arabia.
